---
title: "Acute Presentation of  GI Cancer"
editor: visual
bibliography: zotero.bib
csl: elsevier-stanford.csl
link-citations: true
---


emergency sesrvice, hospital
Emergency Medicine/*instrumentation/methods

OT
emergency department operations
ER visit
emergency daprtment visit
ED visit

("emergency medicine"[All Fields] OR "emergency department"[All Fields] OR "ED visit"[All Fields] OR "emergency room"[All Fields]) AND ("colon cancer"[All Fields] OR "colorectal cancer"[All Fields] OR "anal cancer"[All Fields] OR "anorectal cancer"[All Fields] OR "stomach cancer"[All Fields] OR "gastric cancer"[All Fields] OR "esophageal cancer"[All Fields] OR "esophageal cancer"[All Fields] OR "rectal cancer"[All Fields] OR "colon cancer"[All Fields])
